name: list_board_parameters
short_description: Get the list of parameters supported by board.xml file
full_help:
list_board_parameters

Description: 
Get the list of parameters supported by board.xml file

Syntax: 
list_board_parameters  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, Board

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
